fields.description: The value found in the XML identifier element that uniquely identifies this profile. For PEPPOL: CustomizationID value (e.g., urn:cen.eu:en16931:2017#compliant#urn:fdc:peppol.eu:2017:poacc:billing:3.0). For CII/Factur-X: Guideline Parameter ID value (e.g., urn:cen.eu:en16931:2017#compliant#urn:factur-x.eu:1p0:basic).
fields.label: Identifier Value

fields.description: Name of the XML element that contains the profile identifier (e.g., CustomizationID, ProfileID, GuidelineParameter).
fields.label: Identifier Element Name

fields.description: Namespace URI where the identifier element is found (e.g., urn:oasis:names:specification:ubl:schema:xsd:CommonBasicComponents-2).
fields.label: Identifier Namespace

fields.description: Path to function that will generate the xml from source document.
fields.label: Generator Path

fields.description: Path to function that will validation xml against the authorities standard.
fields.label: Validator Path

fields.description: Path to function that will translate the xml to ERPNext target document.
fields.label: Parser Path

fields.description: Path to function that will render the xml as html preview.
fields.label: Preview Path

fields.description: Path to function that detects EDocument field values from incoming XML (e.g., company, supplier, profile etc.)
fields.label: Detector Path

fields.description: Path to function to match incoming xml messages to ERPNext document.
fields.label: Matcher Path
Ignore Validation Error for EDocument generation
